sections.paragraph:
verb לזעום

be angry, furious, irate, enraged, indignant

verb להיזעם

be angry, furious, irate, enraged, indignant

verb להזדעם

be angry, furious, irate, enraged, indignant

verb להזעים

to anger, infuriate, enrage; shake

masculine noun

fury, rage, anger, wrath, indignation, fume, furor, grimness, irateness, ire, spleen, wrathfulness
